title: The Cimetière des Innocents—Holy Innocents' Cemetery—in Paris ...
highlights: The Cimetière des Innocents—Holy Innocents' Cemetery—in Paris had been in use for centuries when a flood in 1780 resulted in rotting bodies littering a neighboring property. Subsequently, all of the cemetery's remains were exhumed and moved to the tunnels beneath the city.
